item.description: ### Fixed - **Plan approvals: honest and instant.** It turns out current Claude Code ignores any plan approval sent from outside the terminal once its plan screen is up — so 0.4.3's "approve plans from your phone" could never actually work, and tapping Allow just meant approving again at the terminal. Perch no longer pretends: when a plan is ready you get a simple heads-up — "Plan ready — review and approve in the terminal" — with no Allow/Deny buttons that can't do anything and no lock-screen countdown that lies. The plan and its approval prompt appear in your terminal immediately, as they always did. (Remote plan approval returns the moment Claude Code honors it.) - **Approving ordinary tools from your phone keeps working on new Claude Code.** Recent Claude Code versions quietly drop an approval unless it carries the tool's input back — Perch now includes it, so remote Allow keeps landing. - **Fixed a crash in Perch's hook helper** when an approval decision arrived just after you'd already answered the same prompt at the terminal.
